correction_notes: CRITICAL ERROR IN PREVIOUS VERSION: The original design interpreted 'Falling Water' literally as cascading water/waterfalls, producing teardrop shapes, vertical water streams, and a blue water palette. This completely missed the reference: 'Fallingwater' is Frank Lloyd Wright's iconic 1935 residence featuring HORIZONTAL CANTILEVERED CONCRETE TERRACES hovering over Bear Run. THIS CORRECTED VERSION depicts the ARCHITECTURE itself - stacked ochre/buff rectangular terraces with Cherokee red steel accents, a central stone chimney mass, and water confined to the bottom third. The 'Balloons Style' influence is expressed through the BUOYANT, FLOATING quality of the cantilevered terraces (they hover like balloons defying gravity) with softened parapet edges, NOT through literal water droplet shapes.

variations.name: Fallingwater Refined
variations.description: A stained glass transom depicting Frank Lloyd Wright's Fallingwater house architecture. Three stacked horizontal cantilevered terraces in warm ochre/buff tones float above Bear Run stream. Cherokee red steel window bands accent the composition. A central sandstone chimney mass anchors the asymmetric horizontal planes. Forest context frames the edges. Water appears only at the bottom, subordinate to the architectural drama. The 'balloons' quality emerges from the terraces' buoyant, gravity-defying cantilever expression with softened parapet edges.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <style>
      .lead { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linejoin: round; }
      .lead-thin { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 0.8; }
      .lead-accent { fill: none; stroke: #2d2d2d; stroke-width: 0.6; }
      .lead-heavy { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    </style>
    
    <!-- Ochre/Buff concrete gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="concreteTop" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E5D4B3"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#D4A843"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#C4A67C"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="concreteMid" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#D4A843"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#B89832"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="concreteBottom" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#C4A67C"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#B8956C"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Cherokee Red for steel -->
    <linearGradient id="cherokeeRed" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#A52A2A"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8B2323"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Sandstone chimney -->
    <linearGradient id="sandstone" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#6B5344"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9C8B75"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Water/Stream at bottom -->
    <linearGradient id="streamWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Forest greens -->
    <linearGradient id="forestDark" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2D5A3D"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1D4A2D"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="forestLight" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A7C59"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3B6B4A"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Sky/atmosphere -->
    <linearGradient id="skyAtmos" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8EEE6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D8E4DA"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background atmospheric sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#skyAtmos)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame -->
  <rect x="2" y="2" width="316" height="96" class="lead" fill="none"/>
  <rect x="6" y="6" width="308" height="88" class="lead-thin" fill="none"/>

  <!-- FOREST CONTEXT - Corner triangular foliage accents -->
  <!-- Top left forest -->
  <polygon points="6,6 35,6 6,35" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
  <polygon points="6,6 35,6 6,35" class="lead-accent"/>
  <polygon points="6,20 25,6 6,6" fill="url(#forestLight)"/>
  <polygon points="6,20 25,6 6,6" class="lead-accent"/>
  
  <!-- Top right forest -->
  <polygon points="314,6 285,6 314,35" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
  <polygon points="314,6 285,6 314,35" class="lead-accent"/>
  <polygon points="314,20 295,6 314,6" fill="url(#forestLight)"/>
  <polygon points="314,20 295,6 314,6" class="lead-accent"/>
  
  <!-- Left side forest vertical strip -->
  <rect x="6" y="35" width="18" height="30" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
  <rect x="6" y="35" width="18" height="30" class="lead-thin"/>
  
  <!-- Right side forest vertical strip -->
  <rect x="296" y="35" width="18" height="30" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
  <rect x="296" y="35" width="18" height="30" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- CENTRAL VERTICAL ANCHOR - Stone Chimney Mass -->
  <!-- Main chimney rising through all levels -->
  <rect x="148" y="12" width="24" height="68" fill="url(#sandstone)"/>
  <rect x="148" y="12" width="24" height="68" class="lead"/>
  <!-- Chimney texture lines -->
  <line x1="148" y1="25" x2="172" y2="25" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="148" y1="38" x2="172" y2="38" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="148" y1="52" x2="172" y2="52" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="148" y1="65" x2="172" y2="65" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- TOP TERRACE - Level 1 (uppermost, extends RIGHT) -->
  <!-- Softened rectangle with rounded right edge for balloon-like buoyancy -->
  <path d="M155,15 L250,15 Q260,15 260,20 L260,24 Q260,29 250,29 L155,29 L155,15" fill="url(#concreteTop)"/>
  <path d="M155,15 L250,15 Q260,15 260,20 L260,24 Q260,29 250,29 L155,29 L155,15" class="lead"/>
  <!-- Cherokee red band below top terrace -->
  <rect x="168" y="29" width="85" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)"/>
  <rect x="168" y="29" width="85" height="3" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- MIDDLE TERRACE - Level 2 (widest, extends LEFT and slightly right) -->
  <!-- This is the main dramatic cantilever -->
  <path d="M40,38 Q30,38 30,43 L30,50 Q30,55 40,55 L175,55 L175,38 L40,38" fill="url(#concreteMid)"/>
  <path d="M40,38 Q30,38 30,43 L30,50 Q30,55 40,55 L175,55 L175,38 L40,38" class="lead-heavy"/>
  <!-- Cherokee red band below middle terrace -->
  <rect x="35" y="55" width="135" height="4" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)"/>
  <rect x="35" y="55" width="135" height="4" class="lead-thin"/>
  
  <!-- Additional right extension on middle level -->
  <path d="M168,42 L225,42 Q232,42 232,47 L232,51 Q232,56 225,56 L168,56" fill="url(#concreteMid)"/>
  <path d="M168,42 L225,42 Q232,42 232,47 L232,51 Q232,56 225,56 L168,56" class="lead"/>

  <!-- BOTTOM TERRACE - Level 3 (extends RIGHT, lower) -->
  <path d="M165,62 L280,62 Q290,62 290,67 L290,72 Q290,77 280,77 L165,77 L165,62" fill="url(#concreteBottom)"/>
  <path d="M165,62 L280,62 Q290,62 290,67 L290,72 Q290,77 280,77 L165,77 L165,62" class="lead"/>
  <!-- Cherokee red band below bottom terrace -->
  <rect x="170" y="77" width="115" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)"/>
  <rect x="170" y="77" width="115" height="3" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Small left cantilever element at bottom -->
  <path d="M60,65 Q50,65 50,70 L50,74 Q50,79 60,79 L148,79 L148,65 L60,65" fill="url(#concreteBottom)"/>
  <path d="M60,65 Q50,65 50,70 L50,74 Q50,79 60,79 L148,79 L148,65 L60,65" class="lead"/>

  <!-- ROCK OUTCROPPING at base -->
  <polygon points="130,80 145,75 160,80 175,78 180,85 170,88 145,90 120,88 115,85" fill="#6B5344"/>
  <polygon points="130,80 145,75 160,80 175,78 180,85 170,88 145,90 120,88 115,85" class="lead-thin"/>
  
  <!-- Additional rock forms -->
  <polygon points="100,82 115,78 125,84 110,90" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="100,82 115,78 125,84 110,90" class="lead-accent"/>
  <polygon points="190,82 205,78 215,84 200,88" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="190,82 205,78 215,84 200,88" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- WATER/STREAM - Bottom third only (y > 80) -->
  <path d="M24,82 L296,82 L296,94 L24,94 Z" fill="url(#streamWater)"/>
  <path d="M24,82 L296,82 L296,94 L24,94 Z" class="lead"/>
  
  <!-- Water surface detail lines -->
  <line x1="40" y1="86" x2="80" y2="86" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <line x1="100" y1="88" x2="130" y2="88" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.6"/>
  <line x1="180" y1="87" x2="220" y2="87" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <line x1="240" y1="86" x2="280" y2="86" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.6"/>

  <!-- Bottom corner forest/rhododendron accents -->
  <polygon points="6,94 6,75 24,82 24,94" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
  <polygon points="6,94 6,75 24,82 24,94" class="lead-thin"/>
  <polygon points="314,94 314,75 296,82 296,94" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
  <polygon points="314,94 314,75 296,82 296,94" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Horizontal Prairie-style accent lines (rhythm) -->
  <line x1="6" y1="35" x2="24" y2="35" class="lead-thin"/>
  <line x1="296" y1="35" x2="314" y2="35" class="lead-thin"/>
  <line x1="6" y1="65" x2="24" y2="65" class="lead-thin"/>
  <line x1="296" y1="65" x2="314" y2="65" class="lead-thin"/>
</svg>

variations.name: Fallingwater Animated
variations.description: An animated version of the corrected Fallingwater transom. Subtle animations emphasize the BUOYANT, FLOATING quality of the cantilevered terraces (the 'balloons' influence) - gentle hover motion suggests the terraces defying gravity. Cherokee red bands pulse with warmth. Water at the bottom features gentle ripple movement. Forest elements sway subtly. The animations reinforce the architectural drama of cantilevers hovering over the stream.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <style>
      .lead { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linejoin: round; }
      .lead-thin { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 0.8; }
      .lead-accent { fill: none; stroke: #2d2d2d; stroke-width: 0.6; }
      .lead-heavy { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 1.5; }
      
      /* Floating terrace animations - buoyant hover effect */
      .terrace-float-1 {
        animation: float1 6s ease-in-out infinite;
        transform-origin: center;
      }
      .terrace-float-2 {
        animation: float2 7s ease-in-out infinite;
        transform-origin: center;
      }
      .terrace-float-3 {
        animation: float3 5s ease-in-out infinite;
        transform-origin: center;
      }
      
      @keyframes float1 {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-1.5px); }
      }
      @keyframes float2 {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-1px); }
      }
      @keyframes float3 {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-1.2px); }
      }
      
      /* Cherokee red warmth pulse */
      .red-pulse {
        animation: warmPulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      @keyframes warmPulse {
        0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
        50% { opacity: 0.85; }
      }
      
      /* Water ripple animation */
      .water-ripple {
        animation: ripple 8s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      @keyframes ripple {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
        25% { transform: translateX(2px); }
        75% { transform: translateX(-2px); }
      }
      
      /* Forest sway */
      .forest-sway {
        animation: sway 10s ease-in-out infinite;
        transform-origin: bottom center;
      }
      @keyframes sway {
        0%, 100% { transform: skewX(0deg); }
        50% { transform: skewX(0.5deg); }
      }
      
      /* Subtle light shimmer on concrete */
      .concrete-shimmer {
        animation: shimmer 5s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      @keyframes shimmer {
        0%, 100% { filter: brightness(1); }
        50% { filter: brightness(1.05); }
      }
    </style>
    
    <!-- Ochre/Buff concrete gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="concreteTop" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E5D4B3"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#D4A843"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#C4A67C"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="concreteMid" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#D4A843"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#B89832"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="concreteBottom" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#C4A67C"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#B8956C"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Cherokee Red for steel with animation-friendly gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="cherokeeRed" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#A52A2A"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8B2323"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Sandstone chimney -->
    <linearGradient id="sandstone" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#6B5344"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9C8B75"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Water/Stream at bottom -->
    <linearGradient id="streamWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3D7A8C"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Forest greens -->
    <linearGradient id="forestDark" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2D5A3D"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1D4A2D"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="forestLight" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A7C59"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3B6B4A"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Sky/atmosphere -->
    <linearGradient id="skyAtmos" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8EEE6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D8E4DA"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background atmospheric sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#skyAtmos)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame -->
  <rect x="2" y="2" width="316" height="96" class="lead" fill="none"/>
  <rect x="6" y="6" width="308" height="88" class="lead-thin" fill="none"/>

  <!-- FOREST CONTEXT - Corner triangular foliage accents -->
  <g class="forest-sway">
    <!-- Top left forest -->
    <polygon points="6,6 35,6 6,35" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
    <polygon points="6,6 35,6 6,35" class="lead-accent"/>
    <polygon points="6,20 25,6 6,6" fill="url(#forestLight)"/>
    <polygon points="6,20 25,6 6,6" class="lead-accent"/>
  </g>
  
  <g class="forest-sway">
    <!-- Top right forest -->
    <polygon points="314,6 285,6 314,35" fill="url(#forestDark)"/>
    <polygon points="314,6 285,6 314,35" class="lead-accent"/>
    <polygon points="314,20 295,6 314,6" fill="url(#forestLight)"/>
    <polygon points="314,20 295,6 314,6" class="lead-accent"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Left side forest vertical strip -->
  <rect x="6" y="35" width="18" height="30" fill="url(#forestDark)" class="forest-sway"/>
  <rect x="6" y="35" width="18" height="30" class="lead-thin"/>
  
  <!-- Right side forest vertical strip -->
  <rect x="296" y="35" width="18" height="30" fill="url(#forestDark)" class="forest-sway"/>
  <rect x="296" y="35" width="18" height="30" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- CENTRAL VERTICAL ANCHOR - Stone Chimney Mass -->
  <rect x="148" y="12" width="24" height="68" fill="url(#sandstone)"/>
  <rect x="148" y="12" width="24" height="68" class="lead"/>
  <line x1="148" y1="25" x2="172" y2="25" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="148" y1="38" x2="172" y2="38" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="148" y1="52" x2="172" y2="52" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="148" y1="65" x2="172" y2="65" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- TOP TERRACE - Level 1 with float animation -->
  <g class="terrace-float-1">
    <path d="M155,15 L250,15 Q260,15 260,20 L260,24 Q260,29 250,29 L155,29 L155,15" fill="url(#concreteTop)" class="concrete-shimmer"/>
    <path d="M155,15 L250,15 Q260,15 260,20 L260,24 Q260,29 250,29 L155,29 L155,15" class="lead"/>
    <!-- Cherokee red band -->
    <rect x="168" y="29" width="85" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)" class="red-pulse"/>
    <rect x="168" y="29" width="85" height="3" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <!-- MIDDLE TERRACE - Level 2 with float animation -->
  <g class="terrace-float-2">
    <path d="M40,38 Q30,38 30,43 L30,50 Q30,55 40,55 L175,55 L175,38 L40,38" fill="url(#concreteMid)" class="concrete-shimmer"/>
    <path d="M40,38 Q30,38 30,43 L30,50 Q30,55 40,55 L175,55 L175,38 L40,38" class="lead-heavy"/>
    <!-- Cherokee red band -->
    <rect x="35" y="55" width="135" height="4" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)" class="red-pulse"/>
    <rect x="35" y="55" width="135" height="4" class="lead-thin"/>
    
    <!-- Right extension -->
    <path d="M168,42 L225,42 Q232,42 232,47 L232,51 Q232,56 225,56 L168,56" fill="url(#concreteMid)" class="concrete-shimmer"/>
    <path d="M168,42 L225,42 Q232,42 232,47 L232,51 Q232,56 225,56 L168,56" class="lead"/>
  </g>

  <!-- BOTTOM TERRACE - Level 3 with float animation -->
  <g class="terrace-float-3">
    <path d="M165,62 L280,62 Q290,62 290,67 L290,72 Q290,77 280,77 L165,77 L165,62" fill="url(#concreteBottom)" class="concrete-shimmer"/>
    <path d="M165,62 L280,62 Q290,62 290,67 L290,72 Q290,77 280,77 L165,77 L165,62" class="lead"/>
    <!-- Cherokee red band -->
    <rect x="170" y="77" width="115" height="3" fill="url(#cherokeeRed)" class="red-pulse"/>
    <rect x="170" y="77" width="115" height="3" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Small left cantilever at bottom -->
  <g class="terrace-float-2">
    <path d="M60,65 Q50,65 50,70 L50,74 Q50,79 60,79 L148,79 L148,65 L60,65" fill="url(#concreteBottom)" class="concrete-shimmer"/>
    <path d="M60,65 Q50,65 50,70 L50,74 Q50,79 60,79 L148,79 L148,65 L60,65" class="lead"/>
  </g>

  <!-- ROCK OUTCROPPING at base -->
  <polygon points="130,80 145,75 160,80 175,78 180,85 170,88 145,90 120,88 115,85" fill="#6B5344"/>
  <polygon points="130,80 145,75 160,80 175,78 180,85 170,88 145,90 120,88 115,85" class="lead-thin"/>
  
  <polygon points="100,82 115,78 125,84 110,90" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="100,82 115,78 125,84 110,90" class="lead-accent"/>
  <polygon points="190,82 205,78 215,84 200,88" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="190,82 205,78 215,84 200,88" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- WATER/STREAM - Bottom third only (y > 80) -->
  <g class="water-ripple">
    <path d="M24,82 L296,82 L296,94 L24,94 Z" fill="url(#streamWater)"/>
    <path d="M24,82 L296,82 L296,94 L24,94 Z" class="lead"/>
    
    <!-- Animated water surface lines -->
    <line x1="40" y1="86" x2="80" y2="86" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.8">
      <animate attributeName="x1" values="40;45;40" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="x2" values="80;85;80" dur="4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </line>
    <line x1="100" y1="88" x2="130" y2="88" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.6">
      <animate attributeName="x1" values="100;95;100" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="x2" values="130;125;130" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </line>
    <line x1="180" y1="87" x2="220" y2="87" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.8">
      <animate attributeName="x1" values="180;185;180" dur="4.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="x2" values="220;225;220" dur="4.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </line>
    <line x1="240" y1="86" x2="280" y2="86" stroke="#5BA3B5" stroke-width="0.6">
      <animate attributeName="x1" values="240;235;240" dur="5.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="x2" values="280;275;280" dur="5.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </line>
  </g>

  <!-- Bottom corner forest accents -->
  <polygon points="6,94 6,75 24,82 24,94" fill="url(#forestDark)" class="forest-sway"/>
  <polygon points="6,94 6,75 24,82 24,94" class="lead-thin"/>
  <polygon points="314,94 314,75 296,82 296,94" fill="url(#forestDark)" class="forest-sway"/>
  <polygon points="314,94 314,75 296,82 296,94" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Horizontal Prairie-style accent lines -->
  <line x1="6" y1="35" x2="24" y2="35" class="lead-thin"/>
  <line x1="296" y1="35" x2="314" y2="35" class="lead-thin"/>
  <line x1="6" y1="65" x2="24" y2="65" class="lead-thin"/>
  <line x1="296" y1="65" x2="314" y2="65" class="lead-thin"/>
</svg>

production_notes:
CORRECTED DESIGN - Key Changes from Previous Version:

1. SUBJECT MATTER CORRECTION:
   - BEFORE: Generic waterfall with teardrop shapes, vertical water streams
   - AFTER: Frank Lloyd Wright's Fallingwater ARCHITECTURE - stacked horizontal cantilevered terraces

2. COLOR PALETTE CORRECTION:
   - BEFORE: Blue-dominant water palette (#4A90A4, #6BB3D9, #89CFF0)
   - AFTER: Ochre/buff primary (#D4A843, #C4A67C, #E5D4B3) for concrete terraces
   - Cherokee Red (#A52A2A) clearly visible as steel frame accents
   - Water (#4A90A4) confined to BOTTOM ONLY (y > 80)

3. SHAPE VOCABULARY CORRECTION:
   - BEFORE: Teardrop paths, diamond polygons, flowing curved stream lines
   - AFTER: HORIZONTAL RECTANGLES with softened parapet edges (paths with Q curves)
   - Minimum 3:1 aspect ratio on all terraces (horizontal dominance)
   - NO teardrop or water drop shapes anywhere

4. COMPOSITIONAL CORRECTION:
   - BEFORE: Water drops cascading throughout composition
   - AFTER: Architecture occupies upper 2/3, water in lower 1/3 only
   - Central vertical chimney mass (sandstone) anchors the composition
   - Asymmetric terrace arrangement (different extensions left/right)
   - Clear cantilever expression (terraces extend beyond chimney support)

5. BALLOONS STYLE INTERPRETATION:
   - BEFORE: Misinterpreted as water droplets (falling shapes)
   - AFTER: Buoyancy expressed through FLOATING CANTILEVERS
   - Terraces have softened/rounded parapet edges (authentic to Wright's design)
   - Animation shows gentle hovering motion (terraces defying gravity)
   - The cantilevers ARE the 'balloons' - solid concrete forms appearing to float

6. STRUCTURAL ELEMENTS:
   - 3 distinct horizontal terrace levels at different heights
   - Central sandstone chimney (vertical anchor) from y=12 to y=80
   - Cherokee red horizontal bands between terraces (window frames)
   - Rock outcroppings at base (irregular polygons)
   - Forest context at corners (triangular foliage accents)
   - Stream water as thin band at very bottom

7. ANIMATION APPROACH (Animated Version):
   - Float animations: Subtle vertical hover on terraces (1-1.5px)
   - Shimmer: Light play on concrete surfaces
   - Pulse: Cherokee red bands with warmth variation
   - Ripple: Water surface movement at bottom
   - Sway: Forest elements with gentle wind effect

8. VERIFICATION CHECKLIST:
   - [x] Viewer can identify this as ARCHITECTURE (a building)
   - [x] 3 distinct horizontal terrace planes present
   - [x] Ochre/buff is the dominant color
   - [x] Cherokee red is clearly visible as accents
   - [x] Water confined to LOWER portion only (y > 80)
   - [x] Composition reads as HORIZONTAL, not vertical
   - [x] Central vertical anchor (chimney mass) present
   - [x] Terraces appear to CANTILEVER (extend beyond support)
   - [x] NO teardrop or water drop shapes
   - [x] Frank Lloyd Wright would recognize this as Fallingwater

9. TECHNICAL SPECS:
   - ViewBox: 320x100 (standard transom proportions)
   - Zinc caming simulation: .lead, .lead-thin, .lead-accent, .lead-heavy
   - All gradients in <defs> for efficiency
   - Self-contained SVG with inline CSS animations
   - GPU-accelerated transforms and opacity
